message:
feat(layout,render-svg,render-term): add constraint-based layout solver, SVG gradient/filter support, and terminal Unicode box drawing

Layout engine gains an LP/MIP constraint solver integration path for
deterministic node placement (complementing the existing force-directed and
BK layered approaches). Existing force and BK algorithms receive additional
numerical guards and edge-case handling.

SVG renderer adds linear/radial gradient definitions, drop-shadow filter
emission, text anchor alignment, and proper viewBox/preserveAspectRatio
handling for responsive scaling. Canvas renderer receives minor alignment
fixes to stay in sync.

Terminal renderer adds Unicode box-drawing character support for rendering
graph edges, borders, and connector lines in terminal output, with fallback
to ASCII when the terminal doesn't support Unicode.

Golden test fixtures updated to reflect the rendering improvements (SVG path
data and layout checksum changes).

- crates/fm-layout/src/lib.rs: constraint solver scaffolding, force/BK guards
- crates/fm-render-svg/src/lib.rs: gradients, filters, text anchors, viewBox
- crates/fm-render-canvas/src/renderer.rs: alignment sync
- crates/fm-render-term/src/renderer.rs: Unicode box drawing, edge rendering
- crates/fm-cli/tests/golden/*.svg, layout_checksums.json: updated fixtures
- .beads/issues.jsonl: track layout/render tasks

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
